title: Hara Gebeya Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Hara Gebeya with a Z-Score of +3.23. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Hara Gebeya is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 10.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is relatively low at 22%, and the wind speed is moderate at 13.3 km/h. 
 The lack of rainfall and high temperatures may lead to severe consequences for the local ecosystem and infrastructure.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave in Hara Gebeya.
